svg.style: background: transparent; background-color: transparent; color-scheme: light dark;

rect.style: fill: light-dark(rgb(213, 245, 227), rgb(12, 40, 24)); stroke: light-dark(rgb(30, 132, 73), rgb(81, 168, 118));

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe flex-start; justify-content: unsafe flex-start; width: 478px; height: 1px; padding-top: 62px; margin-left: 130px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: left; color: #1e8449;

display: inline-block; font-size: 10px; font-family: "Helvetica"; color: light-dark(#1e8449, #51a876); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; font-weight: bold; white-space: normal; word-wrap: normal;
